evidence: Positions PrediCache as a no-kernel-module alternative to vmcache; §2.1.
PrediCache offers multi-reference support that LeanStore's pointer swizzling forbids; §2.1.
CBP replaces the paper's hand-picked 1/32 and 1/512 with online adaptation.
G1 is exactly the gap CBP targets.
Sensitivity sweep shows TPC-C and rndread peak at 1/16, not 1/32.
E1 directly measures the per-workload optimum.
v3 hill-climber stage of CBP tested in E2.
v4 bandit stage of CBP tested in E3.
CBP-static row (counters only, no adaptation) measures bookkeeping floor at 8-23%.
CBP-v3 is -11.5% to -22.4% vs default — original claim C3 falsified.
CBP-v4 within 1σ of default on TPC-C (-0.83%) and rndread (-0.23%).
C4 documents the v3->v4 redesign that closed the round-1 gap.
Novelty check confirmed CBP operates on probabilistic promotion-to-preferred-frame, distinct from AdaptiveClimb's LRU-list promotion distance.
v3 form of CBP failed on all 3 workloads — drove the redesign captured in v4.
